summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five open PRs. No merge is recommended because none has complete merge preflight proof from the artifact, including hydrated comments/review-bot comments and passed Codex /review. One small independent PR can stay queued for full merge preflight; four PRs need specific maintainer/author decisions or repair context before finalization.

actions.reason: Independent ready-looking PR, but merge is blocked until a refreshed preflight proves comments, bot findings, Codex /review, and validation are complete.
Active author-followup state plus failing validation requires maintainer decision or refreshed repair instructions before Clownfish can recommend merge or repair.
Product/platform risk and App Store compatibility need maintainer judgment before any merge path; merge preflight is also incomplete.
Broad auth/provider/session-state delta is explicitly a human-gated scope, and merge preflight is incomplete.
Waiting-on-author state is an active follow-up blocker; do not merge or replace until author/maintainer state is refreshed.
